title: campanula elatines var. fenestrellata
intro: Campanula elatines var. fenestrellata, also known as fenestrated bellflower, is a type of flowering plant in the bellflower family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Campanula elatines var. fenestrellata include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting respiratory health. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in salves and infusions for topical application.
